li.label: went along with something against beliefs
li.description: This pawn was directed into an intimate situation that conflicted with their personal beliefs.

li.label: went along with something uncomfortable
li.description: This pawn was directed into an intimate situation that did not align with their personal preferences.

li.label: was intimate with someone they did not want
li.description: This pawn was directed into an intimate situation with someone they normally would have avoided.
